ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the project belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team assigned to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager or owner */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "project_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-team relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-team relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-team relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice is due */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., delivered, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_statuses" (
  "project_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-status relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-status relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-status relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_statuses_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_statuses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status history record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_projects" (
  "client_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-project relationship */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "client_project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager or owner from the client side */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client-project relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client-project relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_method_details" (
  "payment_method_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method detail */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "detail_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method detail (e.g., bank account number, credit card number) */,
  "detail_value" TEXT /* Value of the payment method detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method detail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method detail record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_method_details_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
